calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marissa Smith for petitioners Ronald Lau and Brian Keene (via Zoom).
Claudette Debrue, beneficiary (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court inquired regarding notice to certain heirs and the status of the heir search efforts. Counsel described the steps taken to locate the heirs and the ongoing investigation.

There being no objections raised, the Court granted the petition and admitted the lost will dated March 10, 2008, to probate.

Ronald Lau and Brian Keene were appointed as Co-Executors, with full IAEA authority. Bond was set at $987,000.

Michael Kasolas was appointed probate referee. The Court disclosed that the assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for August 10, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and stated that if either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

The Court directed counsel to file a supplemental declaration reflecting the final results of the heir search investigation upon completion.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
